Acceptance Requirement: Engine calculates from normalized input without reading UI/DOM.
How To Verify: Run fixture through pure calculation function.

Acceptance Requirement: AS-IS baseline totals remain unchanged unless explicitly approved.
Every pricing-impact result has formula ID and trace row.
How To Verify: Inspect calculation trace for UAT cases.
Compare Formula Constants Audit to implementation.

Acceptance Requirement: Vehicle fit uses selected vehicle body specs.
Capacity pricing considers both volume and payload.
Crew logic uses max single item weight, not average weight.
Pickup and delivery time use separate approved coefficients.
Warnings block or route approval per reference rule.
Contribution margin is calculated after payouts/overhead/discount order.
How To Verify: Margin UAT with discount and broker payout.

Acceptance Requirement: Estimate snapshot is immutable and reproducible.
How To Verify: Change variable, reopen old estimate, compare snapshot.

Acceptance Requirement: CEO approval decisions are reflected in variables/references/formula statuses.
How To Verify: Review CEO Approval sheet and formula statuses.
